description: Product Description By My Beard Conditioner & Face Moisturiser 300ml is a specially crafted formula designed to nourish and soften both your beard and the skin beneath. Enriched with essential oils, this lightweight, non-greasy conditioner deeply hydrates and helps to reduce itchiness and irritation, making it ideal for daily beard maintenance. Whether you have short stubble or a long, thick beard, this conditioning moisturiser ensures your facial hair remains smooth, manageable, and well-groomed while keeping your skin moisturized and flake-free. Elevate your grooming routine with By My Beard for a healthy, stylish beard every day. Ingredients Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Dimethicone, Amodimethicone, Parfum, Persea Gratissima Oil, Triethanolamine, Carbomer, Trideceth-12, Menthol, Cetrimonium Chloride, Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Coumarin, Limonene, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Linalool. Directions Apply a small amount of beard care conditioner to your beard and face. Gently massage it into the skin of the hair. Leave on for a few minutes before rinsing thoroughly. Use product after shaving or showering best results. Box Contains 1 x By My Beard Conditioner 300ml See more
